name: 2d-metaverse
//: npm-workspaces root (PRD 8). The shared contract package is a workspace member consumed by both frontend and backend; it must be built before either typechecks/builds, so the aggregate scripts build it first.
devDependenciesComment: jsdom is the frontend's vitest environment. Vitest hoists to the root node_modules, but npm nests jsdom under frontend/, so the hoisted runner can't resolve it — declaring it at the root hoists it alongside vitest.

scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @metaverse/shared && npm run lint --workspace metaverse-backend && npm run lint --workspace frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @metaverse/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace metaverse-backend && npm run typecheck --workspace frontend
scripts.test: npm run build:shared && npm run test --workspace @metaverse/shared && npm run test --workspace metaverse-backend && npm run test --workspace frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace metaverse-backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
